experiments.role: Baseline asymmetric shape; establishes k_out marginal rate
Reserve-dimension test (extra k_in rows past k_out)
Minimum k_out compression; worst PPL in trio

experiments.verdict: CONFIRMED in 44-48 band for this run; falsifies naive linear extrapolation
experiments.contested: A sister shape-match run is logged at test_ppl 65.19 in downaloads/the_dead_end_autopsy.md (treated as a stalled run). Later notes (the_two_bottlenecks.md) argue the optimum is k_in >= k_out rather than strict equality.
experiments.role: Shape-match boundary: k_in = k_out at fixed param budget
